scripts.build: tsc -b && if not exist dist mkdir dist && ..\..\node_modules\@esbuild\win32-x64\esbuild.exe src/main.tsx --bundle --format=esm --target=es2020 --outdir=dist --entry-names=assets/[name]-[hash] --asset-names=assets/[name]-[hash] --loader:.css=css --jsx=automatic --metafile=dist/meta.json && node ../../scripts/write-web-html.mjs apps/web
